purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Android App Info label is now 'DENG Tool: Rejoin' (dropped the redundant 'APK' suffix that appeared in the installed-app name).
Home-screen / launcher icon now reads 'DENG Rejoin' so the product family is recognisable at a glance.
Fixed android.os.NetworkOnMainThreadException when tapping any option in the Settings screen — MonitorApi.execRaw now suspends on Dispatchers.IO so every network call is off the UI thread.

Snapshot screen no longer says 'No snapshot yet' forever: now distinguishes 'Snapshot is off…', 'Waiting for first snapshot…', 'Snapshot temporarily unavailable. Retrying…', and 'Snapshot fetch failed. Retrying…'.
Snapshot status line shows the server-reported capture time (Indonesian 12h format) instead of the local fetch time when available.
Termux bridge: bumped MAX_SNAPSHOT_BYTES from 1.5 MB to 3 MB so full-DPI PNG screencaps from cloud phones (e.g. Samsung A51 1080×2400 ≈ 2 MB) actually upload instead of being silently dropped.
Backend /api/monitor/devices/:id/status now returns last_snapshot_captured_at and last_snapshot_age_seconds so the APK can render honest snapshot status.
Backend snapshot upload cap raised to 5 MB (server) so the 3 MB Termux client has headroom on higher-DPI screens.
Stable v1.0.0 Termux package was rebuilt with the new MAX_SNAPSHOT_BYTES; /install/v1.0.0 and /install/latest both serve the fixed artifact.
